title: euodia lepta var. roxburghiana
intro: Euodia lepta var. roxburghiana, also known as Chinese rowan or Roxburgh's rowan, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, commonly found in the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of Euodia lepta var. roxburghiana include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Euodia lepta var. roxburghiana include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
